response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++), but the role specifically targets deep JVM expertise with Java, Kotlin, and Spring ecosystem work on IDE internals. The resume shows only passing Java exposure (robotic arms, mobile orchestration at Altom 2016-2018) and no Kotlin, Spring, Hibernate, or Quarkus experience. The closest IDE-relevant work is C/C++ contributions to NI LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. Recent career trajectory is in TypeScript/Node.js product work and AI tooling, not JVM language tooling.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Prior IDE-adjacent experience contributing C/C++ to NI LabWindows/CVI
Proven ability to work across complex systems and large codebases in multiple languages
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin experience and only superficial Java use years ago
No Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or application server experience visible
Recent focus is TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling, not JVM or language tooling

key_factors.factor: Software craftsmanship and large-scale systems track record
